name: Cabbage Soup with White Beans and Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray Dutch oven with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Add oil; heat over Medium-High until hot.
3. Add cabbage and onion; cook for 6 minutes or until brown, stirring frequently.
4. Add water, noodles, bouillon, and beans; mix well.
5. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, place several layers of microwave-safe paper towels in a microwave-safe plate.
7. Place bacon slices in single layer on towels, cover with more towels.
8. Microwave on High for 4-4 1/2 minutes or until crisp.
9. Blot to remove excess grease; remove from paper towels. Cool slightly; crumble and set aside.
10. Remove Dutch oven from heat; stir in salt.
11. Ladle soup into 4 individual soup bowls. Sprinkle each serving with bacon.
12. Pass vinegar to be stirred into soup as desired.
Makes 4 (1 1/4 cups) servings.
